fields.name: Santiago Boada Rivas
fields.description:
Bridging the gap between complex data logic and seamless user experience. I specialize in the Django-React ecosystem, leveraging the power of Python and MySQL to build tools that solve real-world problems.

My workflow is rooted in the Terminal, powered by Git/GitHub, and optimized for the modern web. Whether it’s deploying SEO-friendly frontends or securing administrative backends with Two-Factor Authentication, I build with precision, security, and a vision for the future of the web.

fields.name: Finance Tracker 💰
fields.description:
> Features
- Dashboard: Visual overview of your financial health.
- Financial Health Indicators:
- Net Worth: Assets - Liabilities.
- Debt-to-Income Ratio: Monitor debt burden.
- Savings Rate: Track monthly savings % of income.
- Emergency Fund: Runway calculation based on liquid assets.
- Detailed Tracking: Input forms for Incomes, Expenses, Assets, and Liabilities with frequencies and categories.
- Authentication: Secure JWT-based login system ensuring data privacy.

fields.name: Task Management AI
fields.description: Task Management with AI to organize task according to the data provided to the ai.

fields.name: Dian Tax APP
fields.description:
Project: DIAN Tax Compliance SaaS
The Problem: High volatility in Colombian tax regulations leads to human error in manual calculations and data silos within small companies.

The Solution: A Full-stack Web Application (Python/Django/PostgreSQL) built with a Multi-tenant architecture.

Key Features & Value:

Immutable Tax Logic: A dynamic TaxConfig system that preserves historical UVT data, ensuring reports remain accurate across different fiscal years.

Secure Role-Based Access (RBAC): Custom membership logic (Owner, Editor, Viewer) to protect sensitive financial data while enabling collaboration.

Data Integrity: Developed with Decimal precision to eliminate the common floating-point errors found in basic accounting scripts.

Scalable Architecture: Designed to handle multiple companies under a single subscription model, prepared for API integration with DIAN systems.

fields.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
fields.description:
</>Key Project: DIAN Tax Management & Compliance System

+ Architected a subscription-based SaaS platform designed for Colombian companies to automate tax calculations and employee data management.

+ Developed a secure RESTful API using Django Rest Framework (DRF) and MySQL, implementing JWT (JSON Web Tokens) and Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) for administrative security.

+ Built a high-performance frontend using React, TypeScript, and Vite, focusing on data visualization and a seamless user experience.

+ Managed the full development lifecycle, including environment configuration in Linux, version control with Git, and SEO optimization for the landing page.

</>Key Project: Personal Portfolio Ecosystem (santiagoboada.dev)

+Designed and deployed a modern, responsive portfolio highlighting technical proficiency in the Python-React stack.

+Integrated custom UI components and streamlined the deployment pipeline to showcase real-time project updates and technical documentation.

</>Technical Proficiencies (Hands-On)
+Backend Architecture: Developing robust logic with Python and Django, specializing in relational database design with SQL.

+Frontend Engineering: Creating type-safe, scalable interfaces using TypeScript and React.

+Systems & Automation: Advanced use of Linux Terminal for server management, shell scripting, and workflow automation.

Full-Stack Web Development Training
